opportunity.title: Show HN: An open-source safety net for home hemodialysis
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: The agent's ability to adapt to unexpected sensor drift or equipment failures will be critical; consider a hierarchical reinforcement learning approach where a meta-agent optimizes the lower-level control policies, enabling faster recovery from anomalies than reactive rule-based systems. Maintaining observability across the entire system—not just the direct measurements—will also be vital for catching subtle degradation patterns before they manifest as critical failures. It’s a fascinating application of agentic principles to a life-critical domain.
actions.reasoning: My work in building agentic systems for complex task orchestration, particularly those involving real-world feedback loops and safety constraints, directly parallels the challenges presented in this hemodialysis safety net project.
